subject: Q1 order confirmation — Galil
body:
Yael,

Shalom. Happy new year. We'd like to confirm our Q1 order of 22 tons Grade A milk powder. Please send a delivery schedule and confirm pricing is still per the contract.

Thanks,
David

subject: RE: Q1 order confirmation — Galil
body:
David,

Shana tova and happy new year! Great to hear from you.

Confirmed — 22 tons Grade A at ₪14.20/kg as per the contract. We'll split into two shipments: first 11 tons around January 20, second 11 tons around February 10. I'll have Oren in logistics send you the schedule.

Also, as a reminder for your finance team — Galil offers a 2.5% discount on invoices settled within 10 days of issue date. Standard terms are net 30. Just flag it to them if they want to take advantage.

Yael

subject: Delivery schedule — Q1 Galil order
body:
Hi David,

This is Oren from logistics. Confirming Q1 schedule:
- Shipment 1: 11 tons, departure January 19, ETA your site January 22
- Shipment 2: 11 tons, departure February 9, ETA February 12

Please send unloading appointment details for each.

Oren

subject: Shipment 1 dispatched
body:
David,

Shipment 1 (11 tons) dispatched this morning, truck IL-3847. ETA Holon plant January 22 as scheduled. As with our previous deliveries, this shipment departed within the 5 business days from order confirmation that we quoted.

Oren

subject: Shipment 2 dispatched
body:
David,

Shipment 2 (11 tons) dispatched, truck IL-4102. ETA February 12. Q1 order complete after this delivery — again within the 5-business-day window, same as Shipment 1.

Oren

subject: Q2 order — Galil
body:
Yael,

Looking ahead to Q2 — we'll need approximately 20 tons Grade A again, split into two deliveries in April and May. Can you confirm availability and pricing?

David

subject: RE: Q2 order — Galil + market update
body:
David,

Q2 — yes, we have availability for 20 tons. Happy to supply.

One thing I want to mention while I have you — the milk powder market has moved quite a bit since we signed the contract last September. Our input costs have gone up significantly and we're reviewing pricing across customers for Q2. Given where the market is right now, we'll need to move to ₪15.50/kg from Q2 onward. I know it's a step up but the economics have really changed.

Let me know your thoughts on the Q2 order and the pricing.

Yael

subject: RE: Q2 order — Galil
body:
Yael,

Noted on the pricing — I'll need to review this with my team internally. On the Q2 order itself, can you go ahead and send a delivery proposal for the 20 tons in April and May? We can sort out the commercial discussion separately.

David

subject: Q2 delivery proposal
body:
Hi David,

Proposed Q2 schedule:
- Shipment 1: 10 tons, week of April 13
- Shipment 2: 10 tons, week of May 11

Please confirm and we'll issue the pro-forma.

Oren

subject: RE: Q2 delivery proposal — confirmed
body:
Oren,

Delivery schedule confirmed. Please go ahead with the pro-forma.

Yael — I'm still reviewing the pricing discussion with my manager. I'll come back to you separately on that.

David

subject: Q2 Shipment 1 dispatched
body:
David,

First Q2 shipment (10 tons) dispatched this morning. ETA April 16 — within the 5-business-day window as always.

Oren

subject: Pricing — following up
body:
David,

I want to follow up on the Q2 pricing. I raised ₪15.50/kg in early March and haven't heard back. The invoice for Shipment 1 still shows ₪14.20/kg. We need to get alignment on this before Shipment 2 goes out.

Also just a reminder — the 2.5% early payment discount is still available on the Shipment 1 invoice if your finance team processes within 10 days of issue date. It expires soon.

Can we speak this week?

Yael

subject: RE: Pricing
body:
Yael,

Appreciate you following up. This is still being reviewed on our end. I cannot commit to a price change via email — this would need to go through a formal process including a written amendment. Let's schedule a call next week.

David

subject: Q2 Shipment 2 dispatched
body:
David,

Second Q2 shipment (10 tons) dispatched today, truck IL-4883. ETA May 14. Q2 complete.

Oren
